commands.review_summary:
The branch adds gateway reachability diagnostics for credential-required health checks, reuses gateway call connection resolution for probe details, updates doctor flow behavior, and moves a gateway test helper into a test-helpers path.

PR surface: Source +129, Tests +203. Total +332 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main can throw GatewayCredentialsRequiredError before websocket connection, and current health handling rethrows that non-transport error instead of reporting credentials-required diagnostics. I did not run a live Gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
